title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
The following moderation actions were taken after reviewing 6 reports in the abuse queue:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes (high-severity spam).
- toxic_runner — Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers (high-severity harassment).

**Warnings (2)**
- new_member_17 — Warned for not following community formatting guidelines (low-severity).
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for suspicious repeated near-identical replies in help channels (medium-severity, under monitoring).

**No action taken (2)**
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Report dismissed; single-user dispute during a moderation disagreement, no policy violation found.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — Confirmed false positive; report was the result of coordinated brigading following a legitimate moderation decision.

All 6 reports have been closed. Community safety remains our priority. If you have concerns, please use the official report channels.
